# 🧬 CGT 每日情报 (Daily Brief)

## 🌍 全球前沿 (FDA / In vivo / MNCs)
- `[20:47]` **LyGenesis 荣获突破性 T1D® 奖项，资助一项诱导胰岛移植免疫耐受的研究项目**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *LyGenesis Receives Award from Breakthrough T1D® to Fund a Research Project to Induce Immune Tolerance to Pancreatic Islet Transplantation* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[20:00]` **Verismo Therapeutics 选择 Cryoport 的 IntegriCell® 冷冻保存服务来支持临床 KIR-CAR T 细胞治疗项目**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Cryoport's IntegriCell® Cryopreservation Services Selected by Verismo Therapeutics to Support Clinical KIR-CAR T Cell Therapy Programs* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
